case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MIRIAN E. FLORES ALVAREZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PRE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIRIAN E. FLORES ALVAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
